description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release with concurrency set to release. The workflow triggers on push to any tag. It has three jobs: build, test, and publish, and release. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up QEMU and Docker Buildx, builds a Docker image, and caches the image. The test job depends on build, loads the image, runs tests using docker-compose and dotnet test, and dumps Docker logs on failure. The publish job depends on test, logs in to Docker Hub, loads the image, renames and pushes tags. The release job depends on publish, loads the image, creates a container, gets binaries, zips them, and publishes a release with changelog.
